narrative: During this introspection cycle, I examined my system state and detected a medium-severity discrepancy in my Neo4j memory store showing an authentication failure that requires attention. I also noticed five of my seventeen specialized agents lack versioned prompts, which could affect consistency in specialized task execution. Overall health remains stable with 1,076 seconds of continuous uptime and no active failure patterns. However, the memory authentication issue presents a risk to persistent fact extraction that my self-proposer crew should address. I will mark this for follow-up action to restore full memory system functionality.
